blocks.text: Bodo/Glimt's Lisbon Mission: Norwegian Football History Beckons

Tuesday delivers a Champions League evening for the ages. Four last-16 second legs, all perfectly poised — and at the heart of it, Bodo/Glimt travel to Lisbon with a quarter-final within reach. Norwegian football has never seen a night quite like this.
⚽ Sporting CP vs Bodo/Glimt — winner-takes-all, aggregate level. Historic Norwegian CL moment on the line in Lisbon at 18:45

All eyes on Erling Haaland at the Etihad — Guardiola's side needs him to end his goal drought against Real Madrid. Meanwhile in Lisbon, Bodo/Glimt carry the weight of an entire nation into Sporting's Estádio José Alvalade.
